blockers: H2CMI raw rows retain scalar metrics and prediction hashes, not trial-level predictions/logits.
SPDIM P6 rows retain prediction/logits hashes, not trial-level prediction/logit arrays.
Alternative split changes evaluation trial membership, so aggregate metrics cannot be recomputed from hashes.
estimated_gpu_hours_note: SPDIM estimate is inherited from the P6 seed-0 protocol. H2CMI estimate is a conservative planning placeholder because retained W1 artifacts do not include per-target timing provenance; PM approval is still required before any rerun.
